overview: BiggPocket is a production-ready loan application tracking system for DSA companies. It features a secure admin panel for managing loan files across a 10-stage pipeline, multi-user assignment, real-time tracking, document management, analytics dashboards, and a customer-facing tracker with OTP login.
features: Admin panel with loan CRUD and stage management
Multi-user loan assignment with many-to-many relationships
User & Teams management with performance matrix
Document upload, view, and download per loan
Dashboard with analytics graphs and clickable filter cards
Orange and blue BiggPocket branding throughout
